mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_kintai ( user_id, work_date, updated_by, updated_at, planned_work_start_time, planned_work_end_time, planned_break_start_time, planned_break_end_time, actual_work_start_time, actual_work_end_time, actual_break_start_time, actual_break_end_time, scheduled_work_hours, actual_work_hours, overtime_hours, deduction_time, kintai_status, kintai_comment ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{workDate}, #{updatedBy}, #{updatedAt}, #{plannedWorkStartTime}, #{plannedWorkEndTime}, #{plannedBreakStartTime}, #{plannedBreakEndTime}, #{actualWorkStartTime}, #{actualWorkEndTime}, #{actualBreakStartTime}, #{actualBreakEndTime}, #{scheduledWorkHours,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{actualWorkHours,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{overtimeHours,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{deductionTime,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{kintaiStatus}, #{kintaiComment} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_kintai SET planned_work_start_time = #{plannedWorkStartTime}, planned_work_end_time = #{plannedWorkEndTime}, planned_break_start_time = #{plannedBreakStartTime}, planned_break_end_time = #{plannedBreakEndTime}, actual_work_start_time = #{actualWorkStartTime}, actual_work_end_time = #{actualWorkEndTime}, actual_break_start_time = #{actualBreakStartTime}, actual_break_end_time = #{actualBreakEndTime}, scheduled_work_hours = #{scheduledWorkHours,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, actual_work_hours = #{actualWorkHours,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, overtime_hours = #{overtimeHours,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, deduction_time = #{deductionTime,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, kintai_status = #{kintaiStatus}, kintai_comment = #{kintaiComment}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND work_date = #{workDate}

UPDATE t_kintai SET planned_work_start_time = #{plannedWorkStartTime}, planned_work_end_time = #{plannedWorkEndTime}, planned_break_start_time = #{plannedBreakStartTime}, planned_break_end_time = #{plannedBreakEndTime}, actual_work_start_time = #{actualWorkStartTime}, actual_work_end_time = #{actualWorkEndTime}, actual_break_start_time = #{actualBreakStartTime}, actual_break_end_time = #{actualBreakEndTime}, scheduled_work_hours = #{scheduledWorkHours,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, actual_work_hours = #{actualWorkHours,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, overtime_hours = #{overtimeHours,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, deduction_time = #{deductionTime,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, kintai_status = #{kintaiStatus}, kintai_comment = #{kintaiComment}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND work_date = #{workDate}
